description.value:
Your stomach contents can become especially toxic to outsiders. When you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Fire Breath], you can choose to deal poison damage instead of fire damage. If a creature fails its Reflex save against your Fire Breath when it deals poison damage, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Special If you have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Purge Stomach], you can still use your Fire Breath while under the effects of Purge Stomach as long as you choose to deal poison damage.
